## Decision 904: Fixture -- prose-only reversal conditions, no fenced stanza (Decided)

**Status:** Decided
**Date:** 2020-01-01

**Reversal conditions:**
This decision carries a prose-only "**Reversal conditions:**" section with NO fenced
'yaml reversal-conditions' stanza -- the same shape as ~24 pre-Decision-133 decisions (e.g.
Decision 40). It is opt-out by absence: the monitor must not surface it in "monitored", must
not surface it as malformed, and must not report any state for it at all.

This sequencing is re-decided, never silently renewed, when the review date arrives or a
condition below fires -- but there is no machine-parseable stanza recording that, so nothing
here is monitored.
